source: AETHER + Public RSS (arXiv, Hugging Face, MarkTechPost, Ben's Bites)

articles.title: xAI releases Grok-4.3 with native long-horizon agent scaffolding
articles.excerpt: New model demonstrates 4.2× improvement on multi-step software engineering benchmarks and sustains coherent agent trajectories beyond 110k tokens.

articles.title: Sakana AI Launches Sakana Translate, a Namazu-Powered Japanese–English–Chinese Translation Tool With Translate, Proofread, and Ask Modes
articles.excerpt: Sakana AI has added Sakana Translate to Sakana Chat.  It runs on the Namazu model series

articles.title: Synthetic Sciences Releases OpenScience: An Open-Source, Model-Agnostic AI Workbench for Machine Learning, Biology, Physics, and Chemistry Research
articles.excerpt: Synthetic Sciences has released OpenScience, an Apache-2. 0 AI workbench for scientific research

articles.title: Training Gemma-3 for Structured Mathematical Reasoning with Tunix GRPO, LoRA Adapters, and GSM8K Rewards
articles.excerpt: We build an end-to-end GRPO training workflow that teaches Gemma-3 to reason through GSM8K math problems.  We prepare the environment, authenticate with Hugging Face, load Gemma-3, and wrap examples into a reasoning-p...

articles.title: Figure 03 completes 43-hour autonomous factory shift with zero interventions
articles.excerpt: Humanoid achieves new milestone in unsupervised operation, performing 1,240 unique tasks across three assembly lines at the BMW South Carolina plant.

articles.title: Meituan Releases LongCat-2.0: A 1.6T-Parameter Open MoE Model with Native 1M Context and LongCat Sparse Attention
articles.excerpt: Meituan has released LongCat-2. 6 trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model that activates about 48 billion parameters per token

articles.title: Anthropic publishes unprecedented mechanistic interpretability map of Claude 4
articles.excerpt: Researchers reverse-engineered 312 million features inside the model, including the first clear "deception circuit" discovered in a frontier model.
